title: Paleo Perfect Italian Salmon Ribollita
description: A hearty Italian ribollita dish featuring salmon, with a bitter and springy twist, perfect for a date night dinner. This paleo-friendly recipe uses double-fry KFC style salmon for a crispy exterior and a tender interior.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the chopped onions until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped celery and carrots and cook until they start to soften.
Add the chopped kale and cook until wilted.
In a separate bowl, mix together the chicken broth and crushed canned tomatoes.
Add the broth and tomato mixture to the pot and bring to a simmer.
While the ribollita is simmering, prepare the salmon fillets by dredging them in a paleo-friendly breading mixture and double-frying them in a skillet until crispy and cooked through.
To serve, place a piece of the crispy salmon on top of a bowl of the ribollita and enjoy.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
